title: QA Test Variants
description: Standard schema for data-driven test variants used by qa-ui-test plugin

description.description: Human-readable description of what this variants file tests

fixtures.description: Shared test data (users, tokens, etc.) reusable across variants

login.description: Whether login is required before test

navigateTo.description: URL path to navigate to before test

apiSetup.description: API calls to execute before test (create seed data, etc.)

saveAs.description: Variable name to save response for later use

variants.description: List of test variants — each variant = 1 test case

name.description: Unique slug used in test title + screenshot folder (kebab-case)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this variant tests

input.description: Key-value pairs matching form field names

result.description: success = form submits OK; error = validation error shown; success_or_error = either OK but dangerous behavior must NOT happen

message.description: Expected message (success message or error message, partial match)

errorField.description: Which field shows the error (for 'error' result)

errorMessage.description: Error message on the specific field (partial match)

mustNotContain.description: Content that must NOT appear in page (for security tests like XSS)

verifyValues.description: Field-value pairs to verify after successful submission

computed.description: Computed/calculated values to verify (e.g., totals, VAT)
